original_finding_status.reason: Actual stage costs now derive from a canonical payload; gross/adverse semantics and historical cost-case binding remain open.
Definition/adapter bytes and weights replay; feature snapshot derivation from DatasetManifest remains open.
Feature and label source sets are separated; KEY_ONLY and self-reported availability remain bypasses.
Final partition row index matches SplitManifest; label-side join identity remains incomplete.
Explicit contiguous return periods and accepted-session coverage are implemented.
Actual opening/closing positions, fills and blocked attempts drive exposure receipts.

findings.title: Cost assumptions can label non-gross and non-adverse economics as gross/adverse
findings.trigger: gross_only with nonzero minimum commission, or adverse with cheaper minimum commission / more favorable FX
findings.impact: Gross results can charge fees and adverse replay can outperform base because assumptions are economically cheaper.
independent_reproductions: base cost 100.0 versus adverse cost 0.2 on gross amount 1000
findings.minimal_fix: Require all gross-only cost components to be zero and adverse componentwise no cheaper, including minimum commission and FX direction.

findings.title: Historical TrialConfig does not bind max_positions or evaluated cost case
findings.trigger: Unbounded stages satisfy max_positions=1, or adverse stages satisfy a trial with no declared cost case.
findings.impact: Holdout evidence can use a materially different execution policy from the preregistered trial.
findings.minimal_fix: Compare stage max_positions with TrialConfig and add one explicit historical_cost_case per TrialRunReceipt.

findings.title: Historical feature snapshots can borrow a DatasetManifest identity without derivation
findings.trigger: Arbitrary feature bytes are attached to a valid dataset identity string.
findings.impact: A future-edited or unrelated feature snapshot can use the PIT identity of another frozen dataset.
findings.minimal_fix: Create FeatureSnapshotReceipt from a verified DatasetManifest/TransformationReceipt and deterministic as-of selector; historical replay must regenerate snapshots.

findings.title: Transformation field roles and join keys still allow feature leakage and wrong-label attachment
findings.trigger: Label field declared KEY_ONLY, late source paired with early self-reported availability, or join omits complete identity.
findings.impact: row_pit_enforced and final row-index equality can pass with future labels in features or AAA rows carrying BBB labels.
findings.minimal_fix: Restrict KEY_ONLY to fixed identity fields, require complete canonical identity on both sides, fix join keys, recompute sample_id and derive feature availability from actual inputs.

findings.title: Daily portfolio evaluation conflates model samples with realized contributors
findings.trigger: A cross-sectional holdout contains multiple model samples while a frozen top-N portfolio holds a subset.
findings.impact: A valid top-N portfolio is rejected, while selecting only realized holdings would make the sample set outcome-dependent.
independent_reproductions: TOPN_PORTFOLIO_EVALUATION_REJECTED ValueError ReturnArtifact contributor set differs from selected samples ('AAA',)
findings.minimal_fix: Separate model-sample SplitManifest from a preregistered PortfolioEvaluationSchedule; keep exposure receipts for audit, not sample identity.

findings.title: Authoritative provider, production calibration, independent anchor and evidence-room receipt remain unavailable

focused_next_steps: Run contract: max_positions, historical_cost_case and gross/adverse componentwise invariants
Feature lineage: DatasetManifest-derived FeatureSnapshotReceipt and dataset-to-snapshot replay
Transformation identity: fixed KEY_ONLY fields, complete join identity, recomputed sample_id and derived availability
deferred_throughput_scope: R6-008 reproducible research runner / vertical slice
R6-009 structural verification versus explicit replay
